title: Change timestamp format for podman logs
body: The Golang standard library implementation of RFC3339Nano will trim trailing 0s from the nanoseconds portion of timestamps. This is undesirable for lining everything up nicely during terminal output. As the Golang developers have not seen fit to give us a better way, use the one that was proposed on the issue tracker but rejected.
